query: SET FOREIGN_KEY_CHECKS=0; DELETE FROM open_play_signups WHERE sessionId IN (SELECT id FROM open_play_sessions WHERE date >= '2040-01-01'); DELETE FROM open_play_sessions WHERE date >= '2040-01-01'; DELETE FROM reservations WHERE date >= '2040-01-01'; DELETE FROM tournament_registrations WHERE tournamentId IN (SELECT id FROM tournaments WHERE date >= '2040-01-01'); DELETE FROM tournaments WHERE date >= '2040-01-01'; SET FOREIGN_KEY_CHECKS=1;
